title: SNDL Reports Full Year and Fourth Quarter 2023 Financial and Operational Results
text: SNDL Inc. announced record financial performance for 2023, reporting net revenue of $909.0 million, up 28% from $712.2 million in 2022. The company achieved gross profit of $190.4 million, representing 21% of sales. Record net revenue for 2023 of $909.0 million compared to $712.2 million in 2022 with gross profit growing to 36% year-over-year. Cash flow improved dramatically, declining only $84.5 million compared to a $278.7 million decrease in 2022 - a 70% improvement. SNDL achieved positive free cash flow in the second half of 2023, totaling $17.7 million. The company noted: positive free cash flow of $16.3 million in the third quarter of 2023 and $1.4 million in the fourth quarter. SNDL maintains $195 million in unrestricted cash with zero outstanding debt and a net book value of $1.2 billion. CEO Zach George remarked: 2023 was a year of significant financial success for SNDL, including record-breaking revenue and gross profit.
